title: (Bearish Signal) SAVA, Aroon Indicator entered a Downtrend on April 15, 2021.
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
For the last three days, Tickeron's A.I.dvisor has detected that SAVA's AroonDown red line is above 70 while the AroonUp green line is below 30 for three straight days. This move could indicate a strong downtrend ahead for SAVA, and traders may view it as a Sell signal for the next month. Traders may consider selling the stock or exploring put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested this indicator and found 182 similar cases, 155 of which were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 85%. Current price $34.94 crossed the resistance line at $35.60 and is trading between $35.60 resistance and $34.16 support lines. Throughout the month of 03/15/21 - 04/15/21, the price experienced a -33% Downtrend. During the week of 04/08/21 - 04/15/21, the stock fell -17%.

https://preview.redd.it/qsqrisg1ukt61.png?width=1527&format=png&auto=webp&s=83210d60c184cdac35be0043db2ec9243689b685

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram (MACD) for SAVA turned negative on March 22, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to turn lower in the coming weeks. Traders may want to sell the stock or buy put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 39 similar instances when the indicator turned negative. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 30 of the 39 cases the stock turned lower in the days that followed. This puts the odds of success at 77%.

SAVA moved below its 50-day Moving Average on April 05, 2021 date and that indicates a change from an upward trend to a downward trend.

The 10-day Moving Average for SAVA crossed bearishly below the 50-day moving average on April 06, 2021. This indicates that the trend has shifted lower and could be considered a sell signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 12 of 15 past instances when the 10-day crossed below the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 80%.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where SAVA declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 82%.

The Aroon Indicator for SAVA entered a downward trend on April 15, 2021. This could indicate a strong downward move is ahead for the stock. Traders may want to consider selling the stock or buying put options.

[Full information about signal](https://tickeron.com/news/10626450-cassava-sciences-s-sava-35-09-aroon-indicator-entered-a-downtrend-on-april-15-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)

comments.author: MrZwickie
comments.body:
Well, though technicals might indicate this direction. Please keep in mind, that this ridiculous bleed over the last weeks was just because of pure MANIPULATION and shorting on VERY LOW VOLUME (i.e. ideal conditions for manipulation).. Fundamentally, SAVA didn't loose any of it's great potential... ASSET WISE NOTHING HAS CHANGED! Still, great potential of being one of the first companies to bring some relief to AZ disease... I expect some major move upwards in the next 2 weeks. Si that management can bring major news to the table at May 6th shareholder meeting (where they ask for a pool of 4m options to being added to their compensation/ benefits plan)... I'll further lost the truck! 
Do your own due diligence.

comments.author: hdwr31
comments.body: TA is great but has its limitations. It’s true that this stock might trickle down a little further but it could also spike at any moment. And when it spikes, it spikes big. Be careful selling or shorting because you will likely miss out on a great opportunity to buy before this goes to the moon.
